queries.q: Map the customer journey for new users from signup to first value, with emotional highs and lows
We have three months of support tickets and analytics on the renewal flow; turn that into a journey map with pain points
Show me the touchpoints and moments of truth across the full onboarding lifecycle
I want a visual of where customers get frustrated during checkout, stage by stage
Build the end-to-end journey for enterprise admins provisioning their first workspace, grounded in the interview notes
Chart the emotional curve of the trial-to-paid experience so we can see where confidence drops
Take this round of usability findings and lay out the journey stages with triggers and exit criteria
We need to see the whole renewal journey as one artifact before the offsite, including where support gets pulled in
Produce a journey map focused just on the activation phase, with a mermaid timeline
Revise our existing onboarding journey map now that we have new analytics on drop-off points
We haven't done any research yet; synthesize these 9 raw customer interviews into themes first
queries.notes: No research signal to map yet, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Aggregate what we heard across this batch of discovery calls into evidence-backed findings
Analyze these 500 onboarding survey responses for themes before we decide anything about the journey
queries.notes: Structured survey data needs its own analysis pass first, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: We ran an NPS survey after renewal; tell me what the open-text responses are actually saying
I just need a clean mermaid flowchart of our internal approval process, nothing about the customer
queries.notes: Internal process diagram, not a customer-experience artifact

Write a SQL query joining sessions and events for the last 30 days
